gameName.description: Game or application this profile targets

gpuSeries.description: GPU series tested on (e.g. RTX 4070, RTX 3080)

driverVersionTested.description: Driver version this was tested on

settings.description: Map of setting ID (hex string) to DWORD value

contributor.description: GitHub username or display name of contributor

description.description: Brief description of what this profile optimizes

dateAdded.description: ISO 8601 date when profile was added
